extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam kicked from deep position after Quick-Step's train was disrupted by late corner positioning battle, timing sprint before traditional launch point
tactical_patterns: Martin attacked 13.6km out forcing Quick-Step engine to chase, disrupting their sprint train formation before finale.
Lotto-Jumbo positioned three riders through final corner but Bennett launched before traditional 200m point exploiting hesitation.
Quick-Step controlled intermediate sprint points hunting suggesting multi-jersey strategy beyond stage wins with Viviani.

rider_signals.MARTIN Tony: positive: forced Quick-Step to spend energy chasing 13.6km attack, successfully disrupting Viviani's leadout before sprint
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: negative: team controlled race but got knocked off leadout wheel in final 700m, failed to convert superior positioning
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: recognized Quick-Step train disruption and launched earlier than conventional sprint timing to exploit hesitation
rider_signals.VAN POPPEL Danny: neutral: Lotto-Jumbo had three riders through final corner but couldn't convert numerical advantage to Bennett win
